hero.headline: *Every brush stroke* counts in Huntsville
hero.subheadline: From drywall repairs to perfect paint matches — Jose and his crew handle it all with exceptional attention to detail.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Excellence
services_section.subheading: Complete painting services with drywall repair expertise

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, and trim painted with precision. We handle prep work, nail pop repairs, and color matching.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Weather-resistant finishes that protect and beautify your home's exterior surfaces.

services.title: Drywall Repair
services.description: From water damage to nail pops, we fix it right before painting so you can't tell there was ever a problem.

services.title: Color Matching
services.description: Perfect paint matches for touch-ups and repairs. We match existing colors flawlessly.

about.heading: Built on Quality Craftsmanship
about.body: Jose leads a crew that takes pride in every detail — from thorough prep work to spotless cleanup. We're the Huntsville painters who show up early and stay until it's perfect.

reviews.name: Denise S.
reviews.text: Jose and his crew do outstanding work. Very professional with exceptional quality. They clean up everything when finished, even wiping down doorknobs.

reviews.name: Kati L.
reviews.text: Amazing service — professional, efficient and high quality! Painted 1000sf walls, ceilings and trim in 4 days plus fixed all our drywall nail pops.

reviews.name: Phillip C.
reviews.text: Fixed water leak damage in my living room — repaired the sheetrock and painted perfectly. You can't tell where the leak was and the paint match is flawless.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready for exceptional painting work?
cta.body: Jose and his crew are ready to transform your space with the same attention to detail that earned them perfect 5-star reviews.
